ModMetaData.name: HSK Patch: VQE Deadlife
ModMetaData.author: CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
Hardcore SK compatibility patch for Vanilla Quests Expanded — Deadlife.
Brings VQE Deadlife structures and weapons into HSK conventions:
- Material swaps on deconstructable ancient structures so deconstruction returns HSK-native refined materials: * Steel → SteelBar (Open/Closed Deadlife caskets, Dormant/Ancient Military Turrets, Kino Screen, Kino Projector) * Uranium → DepletedUranium (Open/Closed Deadlife caskets)
- Combat Extended patches for the 4 ancient weapons (Autopistol, Machine Pistol, Pump Shotgun, LMG) so they fire correctly under HSK CE.
No content additions or removals — purely an XML PatchOperation overlay on top of the upstream VQE Deadlife mod.
Required: Vanilla Quests Expanded - Deadlife, Hardcore SK, Combat Extended, Anomaly DLC.
